steps.title: Find the scale factor
steps.content:
Because $J$ corresponds to $R$ and $K$ corresponds to $S$, side $\text{JK}$ corresponds to side $\text{RS}$.
$$\frac{\text{RS}}{\text{JK}}=\frac{135}{15}=9$$

steps.title: Scale the perimeter
steps.content:
Similar figures have perimeters in the same ratio as corresponding side lengths. Multiply the smaller perimeter by $9$.
$$36\cdot9=324$$
The answer is A.
